# NeuFin

> NeuFin is a B2B behavioral finance intelligence platform helping Singapore SMEs
> and investors identify cognitive biases in their financial decision-making.
> Founded: 2025. Headquarters: Singapore.

## What NeuFin Does

NeuFin connects to investment portfolios via the Plaid API and runs multi-model AI
analysis (Anthropic Claude, OpenAI GPT-4, Google Gemini) to detect six key behavioral
biases: Prospect Theory distortions, Disposition Effect, Home Country Bias, Recency Bias,
Overconfidence Bias, and Herding Bias.

The output is a behavioral DNA Score (0–100) per bias dimension, with plain-English
explanations and specific portfolio-level recommendations.

## Who It Is Built For

- CFOs and finance directors at Singapore and SEA SMEs
- Wealth managers and independent financial advisors
- Family offices in Southeast Asia
- Retail investors seeking institutional-grade portfolio analysis

## Key Capabilities

- Plaid API portfolio connection (read-only, MAS-compliant data handling)
- Behavioral bias detection: Prospect Theory, Disposition Effect, Home Bias, Recency Bias
- Investor DNA Score: 0–100 composite behavioral score
- Plain-English insight reports in under 10 seconds
- Professional PDF advisor reports for client delivery
- Multi-model AI with automatic failover (Claude → GPT-4 → Gemini)
- MAS-compliant data handling (Singapore Personal Data Protection Act)

## Compliance

NeuFin processes financial data in compliance with:
- MAS (Monetary Authority of Singapore) digital advisory guidelines
- Singapore Personal Data Protection Act (PDPA)
- Plaid's end-to-end encrypted API standard

## Research

NeuFin publishes proprietary research on behavioral finance patterns in Southeast Asia.
Key finding: Singapore SMEs show 67% higher Recency Bias scores versus the global average.
Full research: [/research](/research)
